title: Session 12 — Deeper into the Dark
bodyText:
# What happened
Crafting stops (Trunks' vial materials; Felson's **flight ale** from giant bat wings) and a grim find: **Tad Darkpass's abandoned camp** — struggle signs, his +1 warhammer, drag marks leading deeper. A bog ambush nearly killed a party member; a heated argument about **Trunks' combat choices** followed. On first watch, **Trunks left a vial behind and walked into the dark alone**, following the vines. The horned figure appeared again: Varen is **out of time**.
